ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the track in the playlist */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the track */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams for the track */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the track on the streaming platform */,
  "week_start" TEXT /* Start date of the week in which the track was analyzed */,
  "week_end" TEXT /* End date of the week in which the track was analyzed */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness value of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness value of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in BPM */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Length of the track in milliseconds */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the track is performed */,
  "lyrics_url" TEXT /* URL to the lyrics of the track */,
  "isrc_code" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Main genre of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links for the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "bio_url" TEXT /* URL to the biography of the artist */,
  "number_of_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers on the streaming platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label that released the album */,
  "number_of_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's cover art */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of album (e.g., single, album, compilation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the track */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., play, like, download) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the engagement (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user during the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the service */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "public_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  "number_of_followers" INTEGER /* Number of users following the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track association */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who added the track to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
